skill.name: background-remover
skill.description: AI Background Removal - Remove background from images, create transparent PNG, one-click background remover for e-commerce product photos, portrait headshots, design materials. Supports JPG, PNG, WebP local files and remote URLs.
skill.summary: Remove image backgrounds automatically using AI to create transparent PNGs for product photos, portraits, and designs.
skill.author: verging.ai

security_audit.summary: All static analysis findings are false positives from pattern matching against documentation examples in SKILL.md. The file contains only Markdown documentation with bash code examples showing API usage. No executable code is present. External commands are documentation examples, network calls reference legitimate API endpoints, and environment variable access is for documented API key configuration. This is a legitimate skill providing CLI interface to verging.ai background removal service.

content.value_statement: Remove backgrounds from any image automatically to create professional transparent PNGs. Perfect for product photos, headshots, and design work without manual editing.
actual_capabilities: Remove backgrounds from JPG, PNG, and WebP images up to 10MB
Process local files or remote URLs
Handle both remote and local image sources
limitations: Requires verging.ai API key and credits
Requires internet connection for API calls
Only supports JPG, PNG, and WebP formats

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Photos
use_cases.description: Remove backgrounds from product images to create clean, professional photos for online stores. Upload product shots and get transparent PNGs ready for website display.

use_cases.title: Professional Headshots
use_cases.description: Create polished profile pictures by removing distracting backgrounds from portraits. Ideal for LinkedIn, company directories, and professional profiles.

use_cases.title: Design Asset Preparation
use_cases.description: Extract subjects from photos for graphic design, marketing materials, and presentations. Create transparent overlays for creative projects.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Background Removal
prompt_templates.prompt: Remove the background from this image: /path/to/image.jpg
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick background removal for a single image file

prompt_templates.title: Remote URL Processing
prompt_templates.prompt: Remove background from this image: https://example.com/photo.jpg
prompt_templates.scenario: Process an image hosted on a remote URL

prompt_templates.title: Download Result Automatically
prompt_templates.prompt: Remove background from photo.jpg and download the result to my desktop
prompt_templates.scenario: Process and save the output to a specific location

prompt_templates.title: Batch Processing
prompt_templates.prompt: Remove backgrounds from all images in the ./products folder
prompt_templates.scenario: Process multiple product photos for an e-commerce catalog

output_examples.output: Processing complete! Your transparent PNG is ready at: https://img.panpan8.com/background-removal/2026-03-11/xxx-transparent.png

Downloaded image from URL. Checking credits... You have 50 credits. Uploading to processing server... Creating background removal job... Status: PROCESSING (50%)... Complete! Result: https://img.panpan8.com/result.png

output_examples.input: Remove background from photo.jpg and save it
output_examples.output: Background removed successfully. Downloaded result to: /tmp/verging-bg-removal/photo-transparent.png

best_practices: Check your API credit balance before processing large batches of images
Use local files when possible to avoid downloading from remote URLs twice
Set the VERGING_API_KEY environment variable to avoid passing it with every command
Test with a single image first before processing multiple files
anti_patterns: Don't process images larger than 10MB as they will be rejected
Don't forget to check your credit balance - each image costs 1 credit
Don't use unsupported formats like BMP or TIFF - convert to JPG/PNG/WebP first
Don't share your API key in public repositories or chat messages

faq.question: How do I get an API key?
faq.answer: Visit verging.ai, log in, click your avatar in the top right, and select API Keys. Create a new key and set it as the VERGING_API_KEY environment variable.

faq.question: What image formats are supported?
faq.answer: You can process JPG, JPEG, PNG, and WebP images up to 10MB in size. Other formats are not supported.

faq.question: How much does it cost?
faq.answer: Each background removal costs 1 credit. Credit packages are available for purchase on verging.ai. Check your balance before processing.

faq.question: Can I process images from URLs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can provide either a local file path or a remote URL. Remote URLs will be downloaded to a temporary folder first.

faq.question: Where are my processed images stored?
faq.answer: Processed images are returned as public URLs hosted on verging.ai servers. Use the download option to save them locally.

faq.question: What happens to my original images?
faq.answer: Images are uploaded to R2 storage for processing. Temporary files are stored in /tmp/verging-bg-removal/ and cleaned up after processing.
